arts.ttl: Alan McInally can truly see both sides of Bayern munich vs. Celtic
arts.sum: “The fact all my former clubs are facing each other in the Champions League this season is really special for me,” McInally told FCBayern.com . Alan McInally played for Bayern Munich and Celtic during his playing career, scoring 17 goals for the Scots and 10 for the Bavarians.

arts.sum: Daizen Maeda available to play for Celtic against Bayern Munich in the Champions League The one big dampener for Celtic heading into the Bayern game was the fact that Daizen Maeda was suspended after picking up a two-match ban for getting sent off against Young Boys.
